title: Chief Records & Sonic Architecture Officer
summary: The Chief Records & Sonic Architecture Officer protects Neuroartan’s sound, releases, metadata, and long-term catalog memory.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role governs sonic identity, music releases, metadata, master ownership, and the continuity of the company’s record catalog.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Make Neuroartan’s sound and records clear, owned, searchable, and coherent over time.
